working_on.notes: Toolbar Title overlap fixed with custom TextView. Volume cycling logic implemented (80-85-90). TTS voice selection added to Settings.

pending_tasks.task: Check for edge cases in TTS voice loading on older devices
Add unit tests for Volume Cycle logic

recent_changes.description: Fix missing toolbar title and overlap issue using centered TextView
Implement UI & Audio Enhancements (Volume cycle, TTS select)

errors_encountered.error: MaterialToolbar title hidden by custom children
errors_encountered.solution: Use custom TextView with layout_gravity='center' instead of app:title

decisions_made.decision: Add Volume Cycle but keep it minimalist

decisions_made.reason: Explicit user request overrides previous 'Minimalism' strategy
